faqs.question: How much does mouse extermination cost in Hollis, Queens?
faqs.answer: Mouse extermination services in Hollis typically range from $350 to $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a mouse problem in Hollis?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Hollis locations. Our team understands that mouse infestations require immediate attention, and we prioritize emergency calls to protect your home and health as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: What methods do you use for mouse extermination in Hollis homes?
faqs.answer: We employ a comprehensive approach including inspection to locate entry points, strategic trap placement, rodenticide application when necessary, exclusion services to seal entry points, and sanitation recommendations. All methods are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your mouse extermination services in Hollis?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our work with a service guarantee. If mice return within the warranty period following our treatment, we'll come back at no additional charge to re-treat your property. We also offer ongoing prevention plans to keep your Hollis home mouse-free year-round.
